\tzpentry{ID3330}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3330 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} Y_l^m( \theta, \phi) = \sqrt{ \frac{(2l+1)(l-m)!}{4 \pi(l+m)!}} P_l^m( \cos \theta) e^{im \phi} \end{equation}
